FUNDAMENTALSOFNADIASTROLOGY
In the Nadi system of Astrology, to Arrive at the
predictional part, it is necessary to know : -
i) The characteristics of the respective planets
ii) Their directional aspects
iii) The caustivity of respective planets;
iv) The sign in which the respective planets are posited
v) The 2nd, 5th 7th, 9th and 11th signs from such planets:

14 FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASlROLOGY
vi) Friendly and inimical aspects of the respective planets
It is traditionally common amongest most of the astrologers
to consider the Ascendant (Lagna) as the most important aspect
in predictional astrology.
These astrogers consider the Lagna or the ascendant as
